name: design-formulas
description: Concrete, 2026-modernized design formulas for developers: a numeric reference (type scale, spacing, color weights, contrast, shadows), a brief-to-design-system scaffold command, and a DO/DON'T lint rubric. Distilled from 'Design for Developers' (Twarog & Moller) and updated for OKLCH, fluid type, semantic dark-mode tokens, the 50-950 weight scale, and WCAG 2.2.
